game_info.title: Untitled Game
game_info.concept:
Gorogoa is an elegant evolution of the puzzle genre, told through a beautifully hand-drawn story designed and illustrated by Jason Roberts. Winner of Debut Game at the 2018 BAFTA Games Awards, as well as Best Mobile Game and the Innovation Award at the GDC 2018 Choice Awards. Winner of Debut Game at the 2018 BAFTA Games Awards, as well as Best Mobile Game and the Innovation Award at the GDC 2018 Choice Awards, Gorogoa is an elegant evolution of the puzzle genre, told through a beautifully hand-drawn story designed and illustrated by Jason Roberts.



UNIQUELY IMAGINATIVE PUZZLES
The gameplay of Gorogoa is wholly original, comprised of lavishly illustrated panels that players arrange and combine in imaginative ways to solve puzzles. Impeccably simple, yet satisfyingly complex.



GORGEOUSLY HAND-DRAWN GAMEPLAY
Jason Roberts created thousands of meticulously detailed hand-drawn illustrations, encompassing the impressive scope of Gorogoa's personal narrative.



A NEW KIND OF STORYTELLING
Gorogoa isn't just a game - it's a work of art, expressing itself through soulful, charming illustrations and distinguished puzzle mechanics.
game_info.description: Frame Within Frames is a puzzle game where you manipulate interconnected panels to solve visual puzzles. Each panel can contain scenes that zoom in, zoom out, or reveal different perspectives. Your goal is to collect all 5 mystical orbs by aligning panels to create pathways, reveal hidden objects, and discover connections between scenes. The game features 5 progressive levels, each introducing new puzzle mechanics.
game_info.controls:
Arrow Keys: Navigate between panels (4 panels in a 2x2 grid)
Space: Interact with the selected panel (zoom in/out, activate connections)
Shift: Swap the selected panel with another panel
Z: Undo last action (limited uses)
Enter: Start game
Esc: Pause/Unpause
R: Restart to main menu

TEST_1.test_description: Testing basic panel navigation and interaction mechanics. This validates that the player can move between panels and perform basic interactions like zooming and swapping.
TEST_1.strategy_description: Navigate through all panels systematically using arrow keys. Test space bar interactions on each panel to verify zoom mechanics work. Perform panel swaps to ensure the grid system functions correctly.
TEST_1.expected_outcome: All panels should be accessible via arrow keys. Space bar should trigger zoom/interaction on focused panels. Panel swapping should correctly reposition panels. Player should be able to interact with all game elements.

TEST_1.expected: All panels should be accessible via arrow keys. Space bar should trigger zoom/interaction on focused panels. Panel swapping should correctly reposition panels. Player should be able to interact with all game elements.

TEST_2.test_description: Testing the complete game win condition by solving all puzzles optimally. This validates that all 5 levels can be completed and orbs collected through proper panel manipulation.
TEST_2.strategy_description: Use knowledge of puzzle solutions to efficiently navigate and solve each level. Align panels to create visual connections, zoom into correct perspectives, and interact with orb locations. Progress through all 5 levels systematically.
TEST_2.expected_outcome: Successfully collect all 5 orbs across 5 levels. Reach GAME_OVER_WIN state. Game should track score and completed levels correctly. Final screen should display victory message.

TEST_3.test_description: Testing undo functionality and panel state management. Validates that the undo system works correctly and game state is properly maintained.
TEST_3.strategy_description: Make deliberate moves and use undo (Z key) to revert actions. Test undo limits and verify that panel states, zoom levels, and positions are correctly restored.
TEST_3.expected_outcome: Undo should correctly restore previous game states. Undo counter should decrease with use. Game should handle undo limit gracefully. Panel states should accurately reflect undone actions.

TEST_3.expected: Undo should correctly restore previous game states. Undo counter should decrease with use. Game should handle undo limit gracefully. Panel states should accurately reflect undone actions.

TEST_4.test_description: Testing random exploration pattern to validate robustness. This ensures the game handles unexpected input sequences without errors.
TEST_4.strategy_description: Execute random valid actions including navigation, zooming, and swapping. Verify game doesn't enter invalid states or crash with unusual input patterns.
TEST_4.expected_outcome: Game should remain stable with random inputs. No crashes or invalid states. All game mechanics should respond correctly regardless of input order. Player can still progress after random actions.
